name: chemical-modeling-prep
description: Prepare chemical process targets before time-series, soft-sensor, or LLM-assisted modeling.

interface.longDescription: A structured workflow for chemical process modeling preparation: inspect data, infer tag roles and units, clarify targets, build process boundaries, draft material-balance formulas, and grade whether a target is physically computable before modeling.
defaultPrompt: Audit this chemical target before modeling.
Inspect these process data files and draft a confirmation list.
Build a material-balance formula and computability grade.
